meaning: n.伦敦的上流住宅区(位于伦敦海德公园附近),中上流社会,其生活,嗜好等
examples: MEET Julius Meinl V in a bar in Belgravia and he seems the epitome of the well-bred Englishman, with no trace of an accent.
The BBC has confirmed that the first episode of the popular detective drama, A Scandal in Belgravia, will be aired January 1, 2012.
Housing affordability cannot be assessed in London using data from Belgravia, nor will Upper East Side data tell an accurate story about New York.
For a touch of class try the Library Bar in the Lanesborough Hotel (1 Lanesborough Place, Belgravia).
James and Belgravia courts are among Greater Louisville's most prestigious areas, and perfect for an hour's stroll.
